div1.entryFree:
Expedience, 1) haste: are making hither with all due e. R2 II, 1, 287. will with all e. charge on us, H5 IV, 3, 70.
2) expedition, enterprise, campaign: what our council did decree in forwarding this dear e. H4A I, 1, 33. I shall break the cause of our e. to the queen, Ant. I, 2, 185.
